description: As the TARC team's simulation engineer, modify the rocket design at /home/ga/Documents/rockets/simple_model_rocket.ork to achieve a target altitude of 200.0 meters (± 2.0 meters). Replace the current motor with an Estes C6-5 and add a 'Mass Component' named 'Tuning Ballast' inside the nose cone. Adjust the ballast mass to reach the target apogee. Save the final design to /home/ga/Documents/rockets/tuned_altitude_rocket.ork and export a tuning report containing the motor used, final ballast mass, and final simulated apogee to /home/ga/Documents/exports/ballast_tuning_report.txt.
